g.text: User feedback during and after form submission
We'll get back to you soon.
Network error. Your data is preserved.
In HTML: <input type="text" name="botcheck" class="hidden" tabindex="-1" autocomplete="off">
CSS hides from users but bots auto-fill. Filled = spam, rejected silently.
aria-hidden="true" ensures screen readers skip it.
Built with Next.js 15, Supabase, and Tailwind CSS
Button shows spinner, text changes to "Sending..."
Button disabled to prevent double submission.
Form fields become read-only during submission.
Red alert with clear error message.
User input is preserved for retry.
Queue count badge shows pending messages.
CSS hidden, not visible to users.
